High Steward
Lorent Tyrell

Book The World of Ice & Fire (mentioned)
For the youngest son of Leo Tyrell, see Lorent Tyrell.

Lorent Tyrell was a member of House Tyrell and a High Steward of the Reach during the reign of Mern VI Gardener, King of the Reach.

History[ ]

Lorent succeeded his father, Ser Robert Tyrell, as High Steward. He continued his father's and grandfather's work in aiding his king, Mern VI, in the reconstruction of the Reach after the Dornish raid that had sacked Highgarden and killed the senile old king Garth X Gardener.[1]
